title: Floral Light Greek Kielbasa Salad
description: A fragrant, airy Greek salad crowned with browned plantbased kielbasa, fresh herbs, and a citrusyogurt dressing that dazzles the senses.
instructions: Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat and add a teaspoon of olive oil.
Sauté the sliced plant‑based kielbasa for 3–4 minutes on each side until golden brown and slightly crisp; set aside.
In a large salad bowl, combine the diced cucumber, halved cherry tomatoes, sliced red onion, olives, mint, dill, feta, and roasted pepper.
Whisk together the Greek yogurt, lemon juice, honey, remaining olive oil, salt, and pepper until smooth to create the dressing.
Add the cooked kielbasa to the bowl, pour the dressing over the salad, and toss gently until everything is evenly coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then refrigerate for 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, garnished with extra fresh herbs if desired.
